# Code of Conduct

This project adopts the [Contributor Covenant v2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/).

## Our pledge

We pledge to make participation in our community a harassment-free experience
for everyone, regardless of age, body size, visible or invisible disability,
ethnicity, sex characteristics, gender identity and expression, level of
experience, education, socio-economic status, nationality, personal
appearance, race, religion, or sexual identity and orientation.

## Enforcement

Instances of abusive behavior may be reported to the project maintainers at
**info@dgingenieriasrl.com**. All complaints will be reviewed and
investigated promptly and fairly. The full Contributor Covenant v2.1 text is
available at the link above.
